mapper.sql: id::text AS id, title, description, image_id::text AS "imageId", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gallery_item (title, description, image_id, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, ${imageId}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE gallery_item
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_id = ${imageId}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
